descriptions.services: Searches within 30 km for motorcycle dealers, repair workshops, parts & accessories shops, and rental shops.
descriptions.fuel: Searches within 20 km for all fuel/petrol stations. Fuel types shown where available from OpenStreetMap. Tap ⓘ to check live prices via Google Maps (prices shown in supported countries — no API key required).
descriptions.parking: Searches within 5 km for general parking and within 10 km for dedicated motorcycle parking.
descriptions.clubs_tracks: Searches within 50 km for motorcycle clubs and racing/riding tracks.
descriptions.atm_bank: Searches within 5 km for ATM machines and bank branches — handy on long-distance rides when cash is needed.
